sections.title: Links
sections.subtitle: Clubs, Mallets and Other Interesting Titbits
sections.body:
### Clubs

[Croquet Association](http://www.croquet.org.uk/)

[Maui Croquet Club](http://www.mauicroquetclub.org/)

### Information

[Croquet Records Site](http://www.croquetrecords.com/)

[Oxford Croquet Site](http://www.oxfordcroquet.com/)

[Croquet World Online Magazine](http://www.croquetworld.com/)

[A History of Croquet and A Beginners Guide ](https://www.playgroundequipment.com/a-beginners-guide-to-learning-to-play-croquet/)[(Thanks to Amelia, Amelia's mom, and Chloe)](https://www.playgroundequipment.com/a-beginners-guide-to-learning-to-play-croquet/)
